title: Eggplant Medley
description: A simple yet flavorful dish combining the richness of eggplant with Mediterranean flavors. Serve as a side or main course.
instructions: Toss eggplant cubes with flaky salt to draw out moisture. Let sit for 10 minutes.
Rinse eggplant cubes under cold water, then pat dry with paper towels.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add eggplant cubes and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer eggplant to a baking dish and top with basil, thyme, and lemon juice.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until eggplant is tender.
Season with black pepper to taste.
